text.message: Really orange you already plowed me
I have to prevent double play, sorry
I’m out of settle spots pretty much dwad
it’s not personal, you’re just winning
I have zero space I lose this
green should get road long-term and then the game is pretty balanced
green I will feed you road if you need
There’s like a negative chance I win
that’s just very obviously not true lmao
Gg orange congrats on fooling the board that the guy who doesn’t produce ore wins
I mean you could be on 9, you’re doing fine
that’s why I had to cut you road
no, if I hadn’t double plowed you probably would have won
I don’t see why that’s controversial lol
